_archetypes.name: UR Artifacts
_archetypes.short: Artifacts-matter aggro/tempo. Play cheap artifact creatures, buff them, generate value.
_archetypes.strategy: Draft artifact creatures highly. Brilliance Unleashed is the payoff. Metalhead, Buzz Bots, Mouser Foundry are key. Manhole Missile is premium removal that also makes artifacts.

_archetypes.name: WB Sneak
_archetypes.short: Evasion & disruption. Sneak creatures deal combat damage → trigger bonus effects.
_archetypes.strategy: Draft Sneak creatures that get value from dealing damage. Combine evasion (flying, unblockable) with Sneak payoffs. Removal-heavy to clear path.

_archetypes.name: BG Disappear
_archetypes.short: Sacrifice & recursion. Cards Disappear (exile from grave) to fuel powerful effects.
_archetypes.strategy: Self-mill and sacrifice to fill graveyard, then Disappear cards for value. Strong midrange/grindy plan. Courier of Comestibles is a top common.

_archetypes.name: RW Alliance
_archetypes.short: Go-wide aggro. Alliance triggers when creatures ETB. Tokens + anthems.
_archetypes.strategy: Play creatures that trigger Alliance on ETB. Token generators are great. Mechanized Ninja Cavalry is a key common. Curve out aggressively.

_archetypes.name: GU Mutagen
_archetypes.short: +1/+1 counters & mutation. Mutagen creatures grow and gain abilities.
_archetypes.strategy: Draft creatures that use +1/+1 counters and Mutagen. Build big threats over time. Tempo + size advantage. Mikey & Don, Party Planners is the top signpost.

_tips.title: Key Mechanics
_tips.body: Artifacts — count for both artifact + creature synergies Disappear — exile from graveyard for effects (self-mill fills yard) Sneak — bonus on combat damage (needs evasion/removal) Alliance — triggers on creature ETB (tokens = multiple triggers) Mutagen — +1/+1 counters matter; creatures grow over time

_tips.title: Format Speed
_tips.body:
Medium speed. RW Alliance and UR Artifacts close by turn 6-7.
BG Disappear grinds longest. Don't be too greedy with your curve.

_tips.title: Draft Priorities
_tips.body: P1P1: Bombs > Premium removal > Best uncommon signpost Pack 1: Stay open, grab the best card regardless of color Pack 2: Commit to an archetype, prioritize synergy pieces Pack 3: Fill curve gaps, grab fixing, snag last removal

Agent Bishop, Man in Black.comment: Premium threat + removal. Fits any deck with white/black.

April O'Neil, Hacktivist.comment: Premium card advantage. Any deck wants her.

Brilliance Unleashed.comment: SIGNAL: Go UR Artifacts. Every artifact ETB pumps your whole team.

Courier of Comestibles.comment: Best common. Food + Disappear synergy. Goes in any black/green deck.

Dimensional Exile.comment: Best white common. Oblivion Ring effect.

Does Machines.comment: Artifact synergy common. Good in UR.

Frog Butler.comment: Recursive value from graveyard. Great in BG and GU.

Groundchuck & Dirtbag.comment: RW Alliance signpost. If this wheels, RW is wide open.

Karai, Future of the Foot.comment: WB Sneak signpost. Late = Sneak is open.

Krang, Master Mind.comment: Control finisher. Build a controlling deck around this.

Leader's Talent.comment: Premium enchantment. Wins games over time.

Leatherhead, Swamp Stalker.comment: SIGNAL: Go BG Disappear. Grows huge from graveyard exile.

Manhole Missile.comment: 3 damage + artifact token. Premium red common.

Mechanized Ninja Cavalry.comment: RW Alliance key common. Multiple triggers per turn.

Metalhead.comment: UR Artifacts payoff. Copies artifact creatures — insane value.

Mighty Mutanimals.comment: Goes in any green deck. Highest GIH win rate in the set.

Mikey & Don, Party Planners.comment: SIGNAL: Go GU Mutagen. Grows your entire team with counters.

Raph & Mikey, Troublemakers.comment: Strong gold uncommon for aggressive decks.

Ravenous Robots.comment: UR Artifacts key creature. Strong in any red deck.

Sally Pride, Lioness Leader.comment: Insane value engine. Build around her with tokens/go-wide.

Slash, Reptile Rampager.comment: BG Disappear signpost. Grows massive from Disappear count.

The Last Ronin.comment: Best card in the set. Wins the game if unanswered.

Turncoat Kunoichi.comment: SIGNAL: Go WB Sneak. Repeated disruption machine.
